title: Tx_Damper, Ty_Damper, Tz_Damper Property
description: This sets or returns the value of the virtual coefficient of viscosity for force control in the specified axis of the force coordinate system.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control
 Ty_Damper, Tz_Damper Property

Tx_Enabled, Ty_Enabled, Tz_Enabled Property
examples:
Function ForceControlTest FSet FCS1.Orientation, FG_TOOL FSet FC1.CoordinateSystem, FCS1 FSet FC1.Enabled, False, False, False, True, False, False FSet FC1.Tx_Spring, 20000 FSet FC1.Tx_Damper, 8000 FSet FC1.Tx_Mass, 10000 Move CurPos +TLW(10) FC1 ROT
Fend
